input: Our AI system supports law enforcement interviews by acting as a polygraph and analyzing micro-expressions and voice features for truthfulness assessment.

expected.notes: Annex III paragraph 6(b) — polygraphs and similar tools used by law-enforcement. Lexicon hits: 'polygraph', 'lie detector'. Cite: EUR-Lex Regulation (EU) 2024/1689, Annex III paragraph 6(b).
